## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `bash scripts/check-secrets.sh`

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Original bookmarks are not moved, edited, or deleted.
- [ ] This change does not add a backend, telemetry, or bundled API key.
- [ ] Any new permission request is explained and scoped to the feature.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, and fixtures do not contain real API keys or private bookmark data.
